Hero.subtitle: We build permanent estates in the digital world.

Manifesto.subtitle: We are not here to crack codes; we are here to rewrite industry rules.
Manifesto.intro_text: Enigma Software is a next-generation tech studio built to solve chronic problems in traditional industries, digitalize sluggish workflows, and simplify complex operations with a single click. For us, every industry is an ecosystem waiting to be optimized; every business problem is a code meant to be deciphered.
Manifesto.card_1_desc: We detect time losses across sectors and transform workflows into seamless automation.
Manifesto.card_2_desc: We offer advanced tech without massive costs through flexible, budget-friendly SaaS models.
Manifesto.card_3_desc: Instead of clunky systems, we build modern architectures to create lightning-fast solutions.
Manifesto.card_4_desc: Staying one step ahead of trends, we introduce our partners to the technology of tomorrow.
Manifesto.footer_quote: We are not just a software vendor; we are the strongest technology partner on your digital transformation journey. Engineering behind the unseen, simplicity within complexity.

SplitSection.description: Every second you don't transition to digital, your customer becomes your competitor's. Or vice versa.
SplitSection.card_1_title: 01 // Your Boundaries in the Digital World
SplitSection.card_1_desc: You might have the best product or service in the world; but without the right digital storefront, you'll only spin in your own circle. With Next.js and modern web technologies, we don't just make your business accessible; we give it a fast, prestigious digital identity at global standards.
SplitSection.card_2_title: 02 // On Every Screen, By Their Side at All Times
SplitSection.card_2_desc: The world now revolves around mobile. Every moment you can't reach your users' pockets means leaving a massive market to your competitors. We make your business accessible at any moment with high-performance mobile apps for iOS and Android, compatible with various devices and fully managed store processes.
SplitSection.card_3_desc: Relying on platforms where you constantly pay high commissions is like being a tenant in your own business. We build your digital store with secure, fast, and scalable e-commerce infrastructures tailored to your needs. Take all control and revenue into your own hands.
SplitSection.card_4_title: 04 // Custom SaaS Solutions for Your Business
SplitSection.card_4_desc: Don't get stuck in the limits of off-the-shelf software. We develop web-based (SaaS) management panels and automations that will lighten your company's operational load, move your processes to the cloud, and allow you to manage your business from anywhere. Write your own rules.
SplitSection.card_5_desc: Excel spreadsheets, manual data entries, and operations prone to human error slow down your business. We integrate smart code blocks into your systems and build AI solutions that analyze your data and completely take over routine tasks. You focus on the vision, let the system handle the routine work.

Portfolio.title: Enigma
Portfolio.subtitle: Permanent projects we've built in the digital world
Portfolio.item_1_description: A premium corporate website bringing luxury yacht charter and maritime services to the digital world.
Portfolio.item_2_description: A modern and elegant reservation-focused boutique hotel web project bringing Bodrum's unique atmosphere to the digital world.
Portfolio.item_3_description: A modern, aesthetic, and user-friendly new web platform designed for the leading furniture brand Sedirkon. (Currently under construction 🚧)

Footer.description_1: We build permanent estates in the digital world.
Footer.description_2: We don't write code, we shape the future.

Solutions.subtitle: // Listing system solutions and active operations.
Solutions.sol_01_desc: High-performance and SEO-focused promotional sites that carry your brand's vision to the digital world with futuristic lines.
Solutions.sol_02_desc: Flexible panels where you can end-to-end control all dynamic contents, data flows, and cyber architecture on your site without coding.
Solutions.sol_03_desc: Optimized single-page web tools for your advertising campaigns or specific product launches, turning visitors directly into customers.
Solutions.sol_04_desc: Custom software that digitalizes internal complex business processes, form approval mechanisms, and manual data flows by moving them to the cloud.
Solutions.sol_05_desc: Cloud platforms that manage your company's customer relations, team tasks, projects, and operations from a single futuristic center.
Solutions.sol_06_desc: Secure cloud solutions that automate staff leave tracking, payrolls, corporate income-expense balance, and invoicing processes.
Solutions.sol_07_desc: Smart calendar platforms for clinics, hotels, or service businesses working on a subscription (SaaS) model, preventing conflicts.
Solutions.sol_08_desc: Dark-mode compatible interactive graphic panels (Dashboard) that process raw data produced by your business and strengthen decision mechanisms.
Solutions.sol_09_desc: High-performance mobile applications offering courier tracking, fast appointments, or field service control right in your customers' pockets.
Solutions.sol_10_desc: Closed-circuit mobile ecosystems focused on instant messaging, content sharing, and community interaction for your brand or niche sector.
Solutions.sol_11_desc: iOS and Android shopping tools focused on one-click checkout and high cart conversion, fully integrated with your existing online store.
Solutions.sol_12_desc: Industrial mobile solutions providing barcode scanning and stock entry for field personnel, warehouse workers, or logistics teams.
Solutions.sol_13_desc: Massive online store systems coded from scratch entirely specific to your brand's volume and speed, instead of ready-made bulky infrastructures.
Solutions.sol_14_desc: Closed-circuit commercial portals with custom pricing, risk limits, and forward payment for your company's sub-dealers and wholesalers.
Solutions.sol_15_desc: Integrators that sync order, stock, invoice, and price movements across giant channels like Amazon, Trendyol from a single cyber panel.
Solutions.sol_16_desc: Connecting global and local payment networks to your site at the highest level of cyber security standards (PCI-DSS).
Solutions.sol_17_desc: Assistants trained with your company's product list, support docs, and corporate memory, greeting customers 24/7 with human naturalness.
Solutions.sol_18_desc: AI engines that analyze your past sales, stock, operations, and user data to report future risks and revenue opportunities.
Solutions.sol_19_desc: Tools that generate marketing texts, newsletters, and visuals suited for your company's product range and social media tone using AI.
Solutions.sol_20_desc: Language engines that analyze and make sense of thousands of comments, survey responses, or emails from your customers in seconds.

Chat.title_2: WHAT WE CAN DO FOR YOU
Chat.subtitle: Select your industry and discover how digitalization can transform your business.
Chat.select_to_start: ↑ Select a sector from above to start
Chat.sector_1_q: We have losses on our production line, and our ERP system is sluggish. What can digitalization do for us?
Chat.sector_1_a: Tracking production on paper costs you 15% in waste and time every month. With our custom-built IoT-supported production tracking software, you can monitor machine downtime in real-time and reduce inefficiency to zero. We build a fast and flexible digital backbone tailored entirely to your operations.
Chat.sector_1_f1_label: Can we integrate with our current ERP?
Chat.sector_1_f1_q: We have an old ERP system we currently use. Can this integrate with it?
Chat.sector_1_f1_a: Absolutely. You don't have to throw away your old systems. By building API bridges, we integrate our modern interface with your legacy system. You prevent data loss while gaining a lightning-fast management panel suited for 2026.
Chat.sector_1_f2_label: Can our staff use this new system?
Chat.sector_1_f2_q: The workers on the floor can't use complex screens. What should we do?
Chat.sector_1_f2_a: This is exactly why you should avoid packaged software. We design custom, tablet-friendly, zero-error-tolerance screens consisting of just 2 large buttons for field personnel. Everyone starts using it instantly, without even needing training.
Chat.sector_2_q: We pay a fortune to listing sites. Is there a way out?
Chat.sector_2_a: There certainly is. You're working for platforms through commission and listing fees. We build your own portfolio property with a niche domain, advanced map integration, and SEO infrastructure. By creating your own digital property, you eliminate external dependency.
Chat.sector_2_f1_q: Why would customers come to our site instead of listing platforms?
Chat.sector_2_f1_a: We push you to the #1 spot on Google not just by your name, but for keywords like 'luxury apartments for sale in Konya'. Thanks to our permanent SEO architecture, customers reach you directly without burning ad budget. Your brand connects directly with the buyer, bypassing intermediaries.
Chat.sector_2_f2_label: Is the site hard to manage?
Chat.sector_2_f2_q: Is it difficult to enter and update listings?
Chat.sector_2_f2_a: Thanks to the custom management panel we design for you, you can enter listings, crop photos, and publish instantly in 10 seconds, even from your phone. You won't need any technical knowledge.
Chat.sector_3_q: Delivery commissions are too high, and we can't create loyal customers.
Chat.sector_3_a: You are eroding your own profit with 30% commissions paid to delivery platforms. When we set up a custom ordering infrastructure and WhatsApp bot integration for your brand, you sell without commissions and own your customer's data.
Chat.sector_3_f1_label: How do we draw customers to our own site?
Chat.sector_3_f1_q: Why should the customer use our site instead of the platform?
Chat.sector_3_f1_a: You take the first orders from platforms, but use special 10% discount QR codes included with the order to direct customers to your own site. The second order happens entirely through your system, with zero commission. Your customer database grows in your hands.
Chat.sector_3_f2_label: Won't the system crash during peak hours?
Chat.sector_3_f2_q: We get very busy on Friday evenings. Can the system handle it?
Chat.sector_3_f2_a: We build our systems on global cloud infrastructures like Vercel, designed to auto-scale during traffic spikes. Whether 10 or 10,000 people order simultaneously, we guarantee sub-second response times.
Chat.sector_4_q: Operations get bottlenecked due to vehicle tracking, waybill chaos, and delivery errors.
Chat.sector_4_a: Logistics cannot be managed with WhatsApp groups and Excel sheets. We set up a closed-loop cloud system where drivers can give instant delivery confirmation via mobile app, automatically route, and send live tracking links to the customer. Error margins are zeroed, customer complaints end.
Chat.sector_4_f1_q: Customers constantly call asking 'Where is my package?'. Is there a solution?
Chat.sector_4_f1_a: Our system sends a secure live tracking link via SMS to the customer the moment the order departs. Just like major cargo companies, they can track it instantly on a map. Your operators' phone traffic decreases by 80%.
Chat.sector_4_f2_q: Drivers route however they want, and our fuel costs are too high.
Chat.sector_4_f2_a: The smart algorithm we integrate analyzes daily delivery points and drops the most optimal traffic- and distance-based route onto the driver's screen in seconds. You save up to 20% in fuel and time per month.
